en.value:
National Policy Reform
·         Supporting political decision making bodies in formulating/improving legal provisions for SNG
·         Support the functional assignment process (sectoral) for different government tiers
·         Support (through studies, reports, discussions) the fiscal decentralization process (transfers, OSR, borrowing, equalization)
·         Develop mechanisms and processes for intra govt. cooperation
·         Build capacities of constitutionally established bodies on how to improve intra govt. relations
Sub – National Institutional Reform
·         Support provincial governments to prepare legal provisions
·         Support institutional reform processes in selected Local Bodies
·         Support improvement of Revenue generation and financial management system of Local Bodies
·         Implementation of Accrual Accounting in selected municipalities
·         Strengthening of institutionalized Capacity Development institutions
·         Strengthen Local Bodies Associations
Civil Society Participation
·         Provide TA for social mobilization to Local Government and Community Development Programme (LGCDP)
·         Intensive support on social mobilization in mid west development corridor (BANKE - SURKHET - DAILEKH)
·         Intensive support on social mobilization in Urban Governance Development Programme (UGDP) municipalities
·         Contribute to further review the LGCDP Social Mobilisation concept
·         Support the capacity building of federations of civil society at dist. level especially  women and marginalized groups
·         Support networking of Federations of Civil Society Organizations (FCSOs) (Mid west and UGDP cluster)
·         Support advocacy/lobbying activities of FCSOs
Sub-National Service Delivery and Local Infrastructure
·         Strengthen Town Development Fund (TDF) capacity as technical and financial institution
·         Elaborate, test, document and disseminate innovative service delivery concepts  of Sub-national Governments

    Improve conditions for local economic development

implementing_agency: Banke District Development Committee, Kalikot District Development Committee, Bardiya District Development Committee, German Corporation for International Cooperation, Kailali District Development Committee, Dailekh District Development Committee

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
